characters.name: African Chief
characters.description: "YOU'VE FORGOTTEN YOUR PURPOSE!"This article is astub.You can help Samurai Jack Wiki byexpanding it. African ChiefInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanRelativesAfrican Prince(son)StatusAliveOccupationAfrican LeaderAlliesArabian Sheikh(Best Friend)Samurai JackThe EmperorEnemiesEnemy TribeAkuProduction InformationFirst EpisodeLatest EpisodeEpisode I: The BeginningEpisode CIVoiced ActorKevin Michael Richardson —the African Chief to a young Jack. The Chief is an honorable, fair and kind leader, who is devoted to helping Jack fight against Aku. Though he can be a very strict especially with his son, whom he wants to except Jack as his new brother/friend.

characters.name: African Prince
characters.description: The African prince is the son of theAfrican chief. He doesn't like littleJackat first, but after they're stopped by the African chief when they're about to fight it out, the prince starts laughing and befriends Jack. They do a lot together, like brothers, like riding animals and the prince let Jack see their ways of living, and the ways of the animals living in Africa. The African prince was captured along with his father and the rest of his tribe by an enemy tribe, who are on Aku's side, and was searching for Jack. They're heard saying that Aku had promised them a reward for the capture of Jack. Jack rescued him and his tribe, and the episode ends with Jack and the prince take a fondly farewell as Jack is ready to continue his training somewhere else. Jack's training in Africa is complete.

characters.name: Aku's Evil Scientists
characters.description: Aku's Evil ScientistsInformationSpeciesHumanHeightVariousAlliesAkuEnemiesSamurai JackProduction InformationFirst EpisodeLatest EpisodeEpisode L: Tale of X9Episode XCIIIVoiced ActorChris Parnell Aku's Evil ScientistswereAku's corrupt but brilliant think tank who were responsible for helping to create and design theX-Models, theBeetle Dronesin Aku's Army, and presumably many of Aku's other technological weaponry. It was unknown how Aku's destruction in the past affected their careers, since there was no Aku to order them to make robotic servants for him, not to mention their own existence, in the future.

Alien TeenagersInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesUnknownHeightVariousAlliesSamurai JackEnemiesNoneProduction InformationFirst EpisodeLatest EpisodeEpisode II: The Samurai Called JackEpisode II: The Samurai Called JackVoiced ActorUnknown TheAlien Teenagersare a group of minor characters appearing exclusively inEpisode II: The Samurai Called Jack. They are a group of (presumably alien) teens who inadvertently became the origin ofSamurai Jack's pseudonym. They speak quickly, mostly in a nigh-incomprehensible hipster lingo.

characters.name: Alien Tigers
characters.description: Alien TigersInformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesAlien TigersHeightUnknownStatusDeceasedAlliesNoneEnemiesWolfProduction InformationFirst EpisodeLatest EpisodeEpisode XCIIIEpisode XCIIIVoiced ActorN/A Alien Tigersare an extraterrestrial animal species that were introduced toEarth. They resemble tigers or other big cats from Earth, except they have teal fur with black stripes, long snouts with many sharp fangs, two clawed toes on each foot, long tails that they can use like whips and they have green blood. Three of these creatures attempted to hunt and kill a loneWolfthat was passing through a forest. After a fierce battle, both the tigers and the wolf were seen laying in a pool of blood. However later the same wolf was encountered byJack, revealing it survived. It is unknown howThe PastAku's destruction affected their existence inThe Future.

characters.name: Angry Mob
characters.description: Angry MobInformationEnemiesJackProduction InformationOnly EpisodeEpisode XXIV: Jack Is NakedVoiced ActorGrey DeLislePhil LaMarrTara StrongDaran Norris TheAngry Mobis a group of townspeople that chasedJackaround town, mistaking him for a cat burglar due to him wearing a burglar outfit, the taxi offers him a ride escaping from all the angry citizens. They resume chasing Jack after he jumped from the taxi and pursued him into a theater's dressing room. As the mob demanded Jack to open the door, Jack steps out disguised as an actress portraying the Princess of Hearts.

characters.name: Anguish
characters.description: AnguishInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesEmotional manifestationHeight5'10"AlliesMad JackBloodlustApathyThe OmenEnemiesSamurai JackDaughters of AkuVoiced ActorPhil LaMarrAnguishis one of the many forms ofInner Jackand a minor character inSeason 5ofSamurai Jack. InEpisode XCIII, Anguish came toJackwhen he was hiding from theDaughters of Aku. Anguish was constantly telling Jack to give up and trying to convince him to commit seppuku, in whichthe Omenappeared to Jack and Jack told Anguish to be quiet. InEpisode XCVIII, Jack defeatedMad Jackand sealed away all the negative personalities including Anguish.

characters.name: Apathy
characters.description: ApathyInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesEmotional manifestationHeight5'10"AlliesMad JackAnguishBloodlustPuffballEnemiesSamurai JackAshiThe CreatureVoiced ActorPhil LaMarrApathyis one of the many forms ofInner Jackand a minor character in thefifth seasonofSamurai Jack. Apathy's first appearance was inEpisode XCVwhere he took over a conversation afterJackdismissed aPuffballafter Apathy noticesAshi's disappearance and was pleased with it. However,  when Jack was going to save her, Apathy later got annoyed by it. InEpisode XCVIII, all of the negative personalities including Apathy were sealed away leading to Jack regain hissword.

characters.name: Aqualizer
characters.description: AqualizerInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesUnnamed sea slug-like raceComplexionOrangeOccupationArena's ChampionEnemiesSamurai JackProduction InformationFirst EpisodeEpisode XVI: Jack and the SmackbackVoiced ActorPhil LaMarrJeff Bennett —The Aqualizer making his entrance. The Aqualizeris one of theDome of Doom Champions. He is an fighter with lethal weapons. Under his helmet, it is revealed that he is actually a robot controlled by a sea slug-like alien. He is voiced byPhil LaMarr(while in his helmet) andJeff Bennett(without helmet).

characters.name: Arachnid Cyclops
characters.description: Arachnid CyclopsInformationSpeciesRobot (Presumably)Eye ColorYellowHair ColorBaldStatusDeceasedOccupationFighterGoalDefeat Opponent's petAlliesOwnerEnemiesJackProduction InformationFirst EpisodeLatest EpisodeOnly EpisodeEpisode XXVII: Chicken JackEpisode XXVII: Chicken JackEpisode XXVII: Chicken Jack Arachnid Cyclopsis the 3rd opponent chickenJackfaces in theCreature Combat Club. An alien animal that has four pairs of skinny legs, a round head, no body, and one large eye. This creature was brought out in a small dome shaped container, and is most notable for managing to break Jack's leg in their fight, making his fight against theMutant EarthwormandThe Finishermuch more difficult for a while.

characters.name: Assassin Droid Army
characters.description: Assassin Droid ArmyInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesRobotAlliesAkuEnemiesSamurai JackDa SamuraiProduction InformationFirst EpisodeLatest EpisodeSamurai versus SamuraiSamurai versus Samurai TheAssassin Droidsare an army of robots sent byAku. The Assassin Droids are introduced byAkuas his newest and deadliest assassin robots. They are very slender androids that wield scimitars. They wear featureless bucket-like helmets that can open up from the front, revealing a fearsome face with glowing eyes. Some of them wear red capes. At least one Assassin featured a monitor built into its chest. Upon getting destroyed, the Assassins can combine into an amalgamation of scrap metal featuring multiple mechanical arms tipped with the Assassins' heads. The Assassin Droids are introduced byAkuas his newest and deadliest assassin robots. They are very slender androids that wield scimitars. They wear featureless bucket-like helmets that can open up from the front, revealing a fearsome face with glowing eyes. Some of them wear red capes. At least one Assassin featured a monitor built into its chest. Upon getting destroyed, the Assassins can combine into an amalgamation of scrap metal featuring multiple mechanical arms tipped with the Assassins' heads.

characters.name: Baba Looey
characters.description: Baba LooeyInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesDonkeyHeightUnknownAlliesQuick Draw McGrawEnemiesUnknownVoiced ActorGreg Burson Baba Looeyis a character fromThe Quick Draw McDraw Show. He, along with his best friend,Quick Draw McGraw, has a cameo appearance inEpisode XXIX: Couple on a Train. Similarly to his TV show, he's a small brown donkey, has long ears and usually wears a sombrero.

characters.name: Baby
characters.description: BabyInformationGenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanHeightUnknownEye ColorBlueHair ColorStrawberry blondComplexionFairRelativesUnnamed MotherAlliesSamurai JackEnemiesUnknownProduction InformationFirst EpisodeLatest EpisodeEpisode LII: Jack and the BabyEpisode LII: Jack and the BabyVoiced ActorDee Bradley Baker The Baby(Real Name Unknown) is a human baby who played a key part inEpisode LII: Jack and the Baby. Revealed to be female during the San Diego Comic-Con, she is cute, has big blue eyes and wears a diaper. She is very childish and immature, but understands howJackcommunicated to her. However, after witnessing Jack's heroism, her expression turned stern upon receiving sakai, the spirit of a samurai.

characters.name: Baby Dragon
characters.description: Baby DragonInformationSpeciesDragonEye ColorGreen with black pupilsRelativesThe Dragon(parent)AlliesSamurai JackProduction InformationOnly EpisodeEpisode XXI: Jack and the Dragon TheBaby Dragonis the offspring of theDragon. It only appears in the episodeEpisode XXI: Jack and the Dragon. The Baby Dragon is first seen in silhouette form inside of its parent, hiding in its egg and blowing flames. The Baby Dragon was the cause of its parent's distress, as its flames excited its liver that caused the large dragon to unleash flatulence, decimating the population of the surrounding villages. Jack strapped the dragon, still in its egg, to his back, and attempted to escape the next wave of gas, but the Baby Dragon blew its flames at the cloud of gas, causing an explosion that sent Jack and the baby flying out of the dragon (although which end is unclear). As they plummet towards the village, the Baby Dragon breaks out of its eggshell and flies Jack safely to the village, where the villagers greeted them with cheers.

It only appears in the episodeEpisode XXI: Jack and the Dragon. The Baby Dragon is first seen in silhouette form inside of its parent, hiding in its egg and blowing flames. The Baby Dragon was the cause of its parent's distress, as its flames excited its liver that caused the large dragon to unleash flatulence, decimating the population of the surrounding villages. Jack strapped the dragon, still in its egg, to his back, and attempted to escape the next wave of gas, but the Baby Dragon blew its flames at the cloud of gas, causing an explosion that sent Jack and the baby flying out of the dragon (although which end is unclear). As they plummet towards the village, the Baby Dragon breaks out of its eggshell and flies Jack safely to the village, where the villagers greeted them with cheers.

characters.name: Beetle Drones
characters.description: "Be careful, Samurai."This article contains potential spoilers for this page!If you don't want to get spoiled, you can leave this page. Beetle DronesSeason 1-4Season 5BTTGiant BTTCombined BTTTSOAInformationSpeciesRobotAlliesAku(Ruler)EnemiesSamurai JackProduction InformationFirst EpisodeLatest EpisodeEpisode II: The Samurai Called JackEpisode XCVII Beetle Dronesare beetle-like robots that make up the standard infantry ofAku's minions after theX-Models. They are created, and upgraded, by Aku andhis evil scientists. Though they are robots, they seem to be able to possess a sense of fear, which can be seen when at least one beetle drone attempted to retreat during a battle againstSamurai Jackand later, around 50 years into the future when a number of damaged battle drones were seen retreating fromthree archers.

Bloodlust made a cameo inEpisode XIII: Aku's Fairy Tales, whenAkuwas telling a story called 'Jack and the Three Bears' to a bunch of children, Bloodlust was portrayed under the name 'Bad Jack' and was destroying the three bears‘ home in the story.

characters.name: Boris
characters.description: BorisInformationGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanAlliesPrincess MiraJujungaI and AmThe GentlemanEnemiesSamurai JackVoiced ActorKevin Michael Richardson Borisis a bounty hunter who only appeared in the episodeThe Princess and the Bounty Hunters. —Princess Mira to Boris' plans. Boris is a boorish brute; he is loud mouthed, rude and responds violently from the slightest provocation. He is the most arrogant out of the bounty hunters, believing that his strength are more than enough to win. He also displayed sexist tendencies as he treats women as if they are beneath him. Although if given enough money, Boris can put that aside.
